<!-- fixture_expected: fail -->
<!-- fixture_failure: aeo / excluded_future_info row appears in classifier handoff -->

# Commission Signal Board Fixture: bad AEO future-info handoff

### 1. Commission Intake Receipt

```yaml
commission_id: fixture_bad_aeo_future_info
mode: backtest
candidate_or_subject: Fixture Product D
decision_context: Exercise failure when AEO future-info enters handoff.
market_or_geography: US
time_window: 2015-2020
evidence_cutoff_at: 2020-12-31
input_status: complete
missing_required_inputs: []
cutoff_rule: post-cutoff surfaces/material are excluded_future_info
non_goals_preserved:
  - no demand classification
```

### 4. Signal Board Rows

| Row ID | Source family | Subfamily | Surface | Observable | Signal role | Row purpose | Graph role | Graph weight hint | Evidence status | Provenance needed | Surface cutoff status | Cutoff status | Handoff note |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| SBR-001 | aeo_answer_engines | answer engines | ChatGPT/Gemini/AIO | answer visibility | aeo_visibility | gap | none | none | excluded_future_info | not applicable | post_cutoff_surface | post_cutoff_excluded | Must never enter classifier handoff for this backtest |

### 8. Demand-Classifier Handoff Packet

```yaml
classifier_handoff_packet:
  candidate_or_subject: Fixture Product D
  decision_context: Exercise failure when AEO future-info enters handoff.
  mode: backtest
  cutoff_date: 2020-12-31
  signal_rows_for_handoff: []
  counterevidence_rows_for_handoff:
    - SBR-001
  source_family_gaps: []
  provenance_gaps: []
  cutoff_uncertainties: []
  classifier_mapping_status: classifier_owned
  prohibited_claims:
    - no demand verdict
```
